text: David AI is the world's first audio data research lab.
Today, we're excited to announce that we've raised a $50 million Series B
from Meritech, NVIDIA, and our existing investors
just 14 months after founding David AI.
Audio AI is a massive opportunity.
When we think about all the AI use cases, we're excited to see come to life.
Like humanoid robots, wearable devices, personal assistants, generative media,
they all rely on audio.
Audio is the critical real-world interface for AI.
Today, David AI works with six of the Mag7 and most of the leading AI labs.
Our customers are pushing the frontier of audio AI
and have made incredible progress in the last year alone.
That said, they're severely constrained by their access to training data
and ability to evaluate their models.
In the coming years, audio AI models will demand orders of magnitude,
more audio data, and evaluations than what exists today.
This data is the key to unlocking breakout audio products
that are more natural, intelligent, functional, and accessible in every language.
We believe our customers will always continue to evaluate and tune their audio AI systems,
just like they continue to refine their search algorithms and feeds.
As an audio data research lab, our goal is to create datasets
with the same rigor that our customers apply to developing models.
This means being extremely intentional in how we design datasets
and taking responsibility not just for the data quality,
but also for how the data impacts the model.
We're deeply grateful for our customers' trust.
We've raised this $50 million to better drive their success.
If our mission excites you, reach out to me directly.
We'd love for you to join us.
